versions.version_description: Fixing Asus4 to Asus2. I only noticed this today, after all this time. :).

tuning: E A D G B E
content:
From: Tourou
Song: Filter - Take a Picture

Super easy song for all guitar players.
The chords on this site were pretty accurate but still not the way they play it 
and sounds weird when you actually play so I tweaked them a bit.

Chords
[ch]Asus2[/ch]     x02200
[ch]A[/ch]         x02220
[ch]Asus4[/ch]     x02230
[ch]Dsus4[/ch]     xx0233
[ch]D[/ch]         xx0232
[ch]Bsus2/F#[/ch]  224422
[ch]Dsus4/G[/ch]   3x0233


[Intro]

[ch]Asus2[/ch] [ch]A[/ch] [ch]Asus2[/ch] [ch]Asus4[/ch] [ch]A[/ch] [ch]Dsus4[/ch] [ch]D[/ch] [ch]Dsus4[/ch] [ch]D[/ch] x2


[Verse]

[tab] [ch]Asus2[/ch]   [ch]A[/ch]
Awake on my airplane[/tab]
[tab] [ch]Asus2[/ch]   [ch]Asus4[/ch]   [ch]A[/ch]
Awake on my airplane[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dsus4[/ch]   [ch]D[/ch]
My skin is bare[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dsus4[/ch]   [ch]D[/ch]
My skin is theirs[/tab]
[tab] [ch]Asus2[/ch]   [ch]A[/ch]
Awake on my airplane[/tab]
[tab] [ch]Asus2[/ch]   [ch]Asus4[/ch]  [ch]A[/ch]
Awake on my airplane[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dsus4[/ch]   [ch]D[/ch]
My skin is bare[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dsus4[/ch]   [ch]D[/ch]
My skin is theirs[/tab]
[tab][ch]Asus2[/ch]   [ch]A[/ch]     [ch]Asus4[/ch]      [ch]A[/ch]              [ch]Dsus4[/ch] [ch]D[/ch]    [ch]Dsus4[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]
I............ feel like a newboooooooorn[/tab]

[tab] [ch]Asus2[/ch]   [ch]A[/ch]
Awake on my airplane[/tab]
[tab] [ch]Asus2[/ch]   [ch]Asus4[/ch]  [ch]A[/ch]
Awake on my airplane[/tab]

[tab][ch]Dsus4[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]   [ch]Dsus4[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]      [ch]Asus2[/ch] [ch]A[/ch] [ch]Asus4[/ch] [ch]A[/ch] [ch]Dsus4[/ch] [ch]D[/ch] [ch]Dsus4[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]
I          feel   so real[/tab]


[Chorus]

[tab]  [ch]Asus2[/ch]       [ch]Dsus2[/ch]
Could you take my picture?[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]Bsus2/F#[/ch]   [ch]Dsus4/G[/ch]
Cuz I wont remember[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]Asus2[/ch]      [ch]Dsus2[/ch]
Could you take my picture?[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]Bsus2/F#[/ch]   [ch]Dsus4/G[/ch]
Cuz I wont remember[/tab]

Could you take my picture?[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]Bsus2/F#[/ch]   [ch]Dsus4/G[/ch]
Cuz I wont remember[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]Asus2[/ch]      [ch]Dsus2[/ch]
Could you take my picture?[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Bsus2/F#[/ch]   [ch]Dsus4/G[/ch]
Cuz I wont remember[/tab]

[tab]       [ch]Asus2[/ch] [ch]A[/ch] [ch]Asus2[/ch] [ch]Asus4[/ch] [ch]A[/ch] [ch]Dsus4[/ch] [ch]D[/ch] [ch]Dsus4[/ch] [ch]D[/ch]
Yeah[/tab]


[Verse]

[tab] [ch]Asus2[/ch]   [ch]A[/ch]
I dont believe in[/tab]
[tab] [ch]Asus2[/ch]   [ch]Asus4[/ch]  [ch]A[/ch]
I dont believe in[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]Dsus4[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]
In your sanctity[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]Dsus4[/ch]    [ch]D[/ch]
Or your privacy[/tab]
[tab] [ch]Asus2[/ch]   [ch]A[/ch]
I dont believe in[/tab]
[tab] [ch]Asus2[/ch]   [ch]Asus4[/ch]  [ch]A[/ch]
I dont believe in[/tab]
[tab] [ch]Dsus4[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]
Sanctity[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]Dsus4[/ch] [ch]D[/ch]
A hypocrisy[/tab]

[tab]  [ch]Asus2[/ch]        [ch]A[/ch]
Could everyone agree that[/tab]
[tab][ch]Asus2[/ch]  [ch]Asus4[/ch]   [ch]A[/ch]             [ch]Dsus4[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch] [ch]Dsus4[/ch] [ch]D[/ch]
No one should be left alone[/tab]

Could everyone agree that[/tab]

They should not be left alone yeah[/tab]

[tab][ch]Asus2[/ch]   [ch]A[/ch]     [ch]Asus4[/ch]      [ch]A[/ch]              [ch]Dsus4[/ch] [ch]D[/ch]    [ch]Dsus4[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]
